prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Structure of the yeast Hst2 protein deacetylase in ternary complex with 2'-O-acetyl ADP ribose and histone peptide. Entity description: HST2 protein. Organism: Saccharomyces cerevisiae. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V74 E68 metadata context marks: none. Known E68 words are allowed; candidate E69 labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: candidate E69 discovery word withheld from prediction context

v74_context_policy.context_derivation: V74 E68 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E68-known words are allowed; candidate E69 words are withheld from prediction text so V74 can discover them.
reasons: candidate E69 discovery word withheld from prediction context
